---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# vagishhemmige.github.io

Personal academic website for Vagish Hemmige, MD MS
Physician–scientist studying transplant outcomes, HIV, and health system design using large national datasets and reproducible R workflows.

🌐 Live site: https://vagishhemmige.github.io/

## Built With

- Quarto
- R
- Zotero (BibTeX export)
- YAML-driven content

## Site Architecture

- Publications generated from Zotero export
- Abstracts and mentoring managed via YAML
- Dynamic citation badges embedded via DOI

## Local Build

Requires Quarto and R.
